---
title: "Twitter Young Thug"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Google Trends

```{r watning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
library(gtrendsR)
library(dplyr)
library(sys)
Sys.sleep(5)
seach_keywords <- c('young thug', 'gunna', 'yfn lucci')
search_trends <- gtrends(keyword = seach_keywords,
                  geo = "US",
                  time = "2020-01-01 2024-12-10",
                  gprop = "web",
                  low_search_volume = TRUE)
```

```{r}
plot(search_trends)
```

```{r}
library(openxlsx)

wb <- createWorkbook()

addWorksheet(wb, "interest over time")
writeData(wb, "interest over time", 
          search_trends$interest_over_time)

addWorksheet(wb, "interest by region")
writeData(wb, "interest by region", 
          search_trends$interest_by_region)

addWorksheet(wb, "interest by demographics")
writeData(wb, "interest by demographics", 
          search_trends$interest_by_dma)

addWorksheet(wb, "interest by city")
writeData(wb, "interest by city", 
          search_trends$interest_by_city)

saveWorkbook(wb, "/Users/sagnikchakravarty/Desktop/YoungThug/web_search_result.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
```

## New York Times

```{r}
library(nytimes)
nytimes_key("WitNU2gMjn4URLzQTRgOxjVN0kWXZCAK")
```

```{r}
keywords <- c("young thug", "gunna", "ysl rico", "ysl", "yfn lucci")
start_date <- as.Date("2022-01-01")
end_date <- as.Date("2024-12-08")
```

```{r}
nyt_article_list <- list()
for (keyword in keywords){
  result <- ny_search(keyword,
                      since = start_date,
                      until = end_date,
                      pages = 1,
                      sort = 'newest')
  nyt_article_list[[keyword]] <- result
}
```

```{r}
list_to_dateframe <- function(lst = nyt_article_list, keyword){
  n <-length(lst[[keyword]])
  ls <- lst[[keyword]]
  publication_date <- c()
  abstract <- c()
  lead_paragraph <- c()
  snippet <- c()
  word_count <- c()
  for(i in 1:n){
      publication_date[i] <- c(ls[[i]]$pub_date)
      abstract[i] <- c(ls[[i]]$abstract)
      lead_paragraph[i] <- c(ls[[i]]$lead_paragraph)
      snippet[i] <- c(ls[[i]]$snippet)
      word_count[i] <- c(ls[[i]]$word_count)
  }
  res <- data.frame(publication_date, abstract, lead_paragraph, snippet, word_count)
  return(res)
}
```

```{r}
young_thug_nyt <- list_to_dateframe(keyword = 'young thug')
gunna_nyt <- list_to_dateframe(keyword = 'gunna')
ysl_nyt <- list_to_dateframe(keyword = 'ysl')
ysl_rico_nyt <- list_to_dateframe(keyword = 'ysl rico')
yfn_lucci_nyt <- list_to_dateframe(keyword = 'yfn lucci')
```

```{r}
wb2 <- createWorkbook()

addWorksheet(wb2, "Young Thug")
writeData(wb2, "Young Thug", 
          young_thug_nyt)

addWorksheet(wb2, "Gunna")
writeData(wb2, "Gunna", 
          gunna_nyt)

addWorksheet(wb2, "YSL")
writeData(wb2, "YSL", 
          ysl_nyt)

addWorksheet(wb2, "YSL RICO")
writeData(wb2, "YSL RICO", 
          ysl_rico_nyt)
addWorksheet(wb2, "YFN Lucci")
writeData(wb2, "YFN Lucci", 
          yfn_lucci_nyt)

saveWorkbook(wb2, "/Users/sagnikchakravarty/Desktop/YoungThug/nyt_article_result.xlsx", overwrite = TRUE)
```

## Reddit

```{r}
library(RedditExtractoR)
reddit_keywords <- c("young thug", "gunna", "ysl rico", "ysl", "yfn lucci")
subreddits <- c("YoungThug", 
                'rap', 
                "Gunna", 
                "Atlantology")

Reddit_Post_DF <- function(subreddit, 
                           keyword = reddit_keywords) {
  reddit_df <- NULL  # Initialize as NULL for flexibility
  
  for (keyword in keyword) {
    reddit_posts <- as.data.frame(find_thread_urls(
      keyword = keyword,
      subreddit = subreddit,
      period = "all"
    ))
    
    # Check if reddit_posts is NA or empty
    if (!is.null(reddit_posts) && nrow(reddit_posts) > 0) {
      reddit_posts$keyword <- keyword
      
      if (is.null(reddit_df)) {
        # Initialize reddit_df with the structure of the first non-empty reddit_posts
        reddit_df <- reddit_posts
      } else {
        # Ensure column names match the main data frame
        missing_cols <- setdiff(names(reddit_df), names(reddit_posts))
        for (col in missing_cols) {
          reddit_posts[[col]] <- NA  # Add missing columns with NA
        }
        
        extra_cols <- setdiff(names(reddit_posts), names(reddit_df))
        for (col in extra_cols) {
          reddit_df[[col]] <- NA  # Add extra columns to main data frame
        }
        
        # Bind the data frames
        reddit_df <- rbind(reddit_df, reddit_posts)
      }
    } else {
      message(paste("No results for keyword:", keyword))
    }
    
    # Reset row names to numerical values
    if (!is.null(reddit_df)) {
      rownames(reddit_df) <- seq_len(nrow(reddit_df))
    }
  }
  
  # Ensure reddit_df is a data frame even if no results were found
  if (is.null(reddit_df)) {
    reddit_df <- data.frame()
  }
  
  return(reddit_df)
}
```

```{r}
YoungThug <- Reddit_Post_DF(subreddit = subreddits[1]) 
```

```{r}
rap <- Reddit_Post_DF(subreddit = subreddits[2])
Gunna <- Reddit_Post_DF(subreddit = subreddits[3])
Atlantology <- Reddit_Post_DF(subreddit = subreddits[4]) 
```

```{r}
library(RSQLite)
# Create a connection to the SQLite database
db <- dbConnect(SQLite(), "/Users/sagnikchakravarty/Desktop/YoungThug/subredditdata.db")
dbWriteTable(db, "YoungThug", YoungThug, overwrite = TRUE)
dbWriteTable(db, "Gunna", Gunna, overwrite = TRUE)
dbWriteTable(db, "rap", rap, overwrite = TRUE)
dbWriteTable(db, "Atlantology", Atlantology, overwrite = TRUE)
dbDisconnect(db)
# Reconnect to check the tables
db <- dbConnect(SQLite(), "/Users/sagnikchakravarty/Desktop/YoungThug/subredditdata.db")

# List tables in the database
dbListTables(db)

# Disconnect after checking
dbDisconnect(db)
```

## The Shade Room

This site covers music industries reaction to the young thug case

```{r}
library(xml2)
library(rvest)
library(tidyverse)
library(robotstxt)
library(knitr)
library(dplyr)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r}
base_url <- "https://theshaderoom.com/tag/young-thug/page/1"
paths_allowed(base_url)
```

```{r}
# Read the HTML content of the URL
url <- read_html(base_url)

# Extract the nodes with the specified XPath
nds <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "list-post-on-sm", " " ))]//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "post-title", " " ))]//a')

# Extract the text content
names <- html_text(nds)

# Display the first few names
head(names)
```

```{r}
# Extract the embedded links (href attributes)
links <- html_attr(nds, "href")

# Display the first few links
head(links)
```

```{r}
library(sys)
shade_room_data <- data.frame()
base_url <- "https://theshaderoom.com/tag/young-thug/page/"
for (i in 1:9) {
  Sys.sleep(2)
  url <- paste(base_url, i, sep = "")
  p_allow <- paths_allowed(url)
  print(p_allow)
  
  if (p_allow) {
    html_doc <- read_html(url)
    nds <- html_nodes(html_doc, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "list-post-on-sm", " " ))]//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "post-title", " " ))]//a')
    headline <- html_text(nds)
    embedded_url <- html_attr(nds, "href")
    df <- data.frame(headline, embedded_url, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
    shade_room_data <- rbind(shade_room_data, df)
  }
}
```

```{r}
url <- read_html(shade_room_data$embedded_url[1])
# Extract nodes using XPath
nd <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "content-spacious", " " ))]')

# Extract the text content
names <- html_text(nd)

# View the extracted text
print(names)
```

```{r}
shade_room_article <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:nrow(shade_room_data)) {
  Sys.sleep(2)
  link <- shade_room_data$embedded_url[i]
  if (paths_allowed(link)) {
    tryCatch({
      url <- read_html(link)
      date_node <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "has-next-icon", " " ))]//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "post-date", " " ))]')
      date <- ifelse(length(date_node) > 0, paste(html_text(date_node), collapse = "; "), NA)
      article_node <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "content-spacious", " " ))]')
      article <- ifelse(length(article_node) > 0, paste(html_text(article_node), collapse = " "), NA)
      df <- data.frame(link = link, date = date, article = article, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
      shade_room_article <- rbind(shade_room_article, df)
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("Error processing link: ", link, "\n", e)
    })
  }
}
```

```{r}
shade_room <- shade_room_data %>% 
  full_join(shade_room_article,
          by = join_by(embedded_url == link))
```

```{r}
write.csv(shade_room, "/Users/sagnikchakravarty/Desktop/YoungThug/shade_room.csv")
```

## Atlanta New Stations

### WSB TV

```{r}
content_scrapper <- function(base_url, 
                             number_of_pages, 
                             headline_xpath, 
                             article_xpath, 
                             date_xpath, 
                             sleep_time = 2) {
  # Initialize data frames
  content_data <- data.frame()
  article_data <- data.frame()
  
  # Scrape headlines and embedded URLs
  for (i in 1:number_of_pages) {
    Sys.sleep(sleep_time)
    url <- paste0(base_url, i)
    
    if (paths_allowed(url)) {
      tryCatch({
        # Parse the HTML page
        html_doc <- read_html(url)
        
        # Extract headlines and embedded URLs
        nds <- html_nodes(html_doc, xpath = headline_xpath)
        headlines <- html_text(nds)
        embedded_urls <- html_attr(nds, "href")
        
        # Append the results to the data frame
        df <- data.frame(headline = headlines, 
                         embedded_url = embedded_urls, 
                         stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
        content_data <- rbind(content_data, df)
      }, error = function(e) {
        message("Error processing page: ", url, "\n", e)
      })
    } else {
      message("Access denied to: ", url)
    }
  }
  
  # Scrape article content and dates
  for (i in 1:nrow(content_data)) {
    Sys.sleep(sleep_time)
    link <- content_data$embedded_url[i]
    
    # Check for NA before proceeding
    if (!is.na(link) && paths_allowed(link)) {
      tryCatch({
        # Parse the HTML of the embedded link
        article_doc <- read_html(link)
        
        # Extract the article content
        article_node <- html_nodes(article_doc, xpath = article_xpath)
        article <- ifelse(length(article_node) > 0, 
                          paste(html_text(article_node), collapse = " "), NA)
        
        # Extract the publishing date
        date_node <- html_nodes(article_doc, xpath = date_xpath)
        date <- ifelse(length(date_node) > 0, 
                       paste(html_text(date_node), collapse = "; "), NA)
        
        # Append the results to the article data frame
        df <- data.frame(link = link, 
                         date = date, 
                         article = article, 
                         stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
        article_data <- rbind(article_data, df)
      }, error = function(e) {
        message("Error processing link: ", link, "\n", e)
      })
    } else {
      if (is.na(link)) {
        message("Skipping NA link at row: ", i)
      } else {
        message("Access denied to: ", link)
      }
    }
    print(content_data)
  }
  
  # Merge the headline and article data
  combined_data <- content_data %>%
    full_join(article_data, by = c("embedded_url" = "link"))
  
  return(combined_data)
}

```

```{r}
base_url <- 'https://www.wsbtv.com/search/?q=young+thug#gsc.tab=0&gsc.q=young%20thug&gsc.page='
num_pages <- 9
head_xpath <- '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "gs-title", " " ))]'
article_xpath <- '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "main-custom", " " ))]'
date_xpath <- '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "b-date", " " ))]'
```

```{r}
WSB_dataframe <- content_scrapper(base_url = base_url,
                                num_pages,
                                headline_xpath = head_xpath,
                                date_xpath = date_xpath,
                                article_xpath = article_xpath)
```

```{r}
library(rvest)
paths_allowed('https://www.wsbtv.com/search/?q=young+thug#gsc.tab=0&gsc.q=young%20thug&gsc.page=1')

# URL to scrape
url <- read_html('https://www.wsbtv.com/search/?q=young+thug#gsc.tab=0&gsc.q=young%20thug&gsc.page=1')

# Corrected XPath to select elements with class 'gs-title'
nds <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "gs-title", " " ))]//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "gs-title", " " ))]')

# Extract the text content
headlines <- html_text(nds)

# Print the extracted headlines
print(headlines)
```

## Magazine

### Time

```{r}
time_magazine_data <-data.frame()
base_url <- 'https://time.com/search/?q=young%20thug&page='
for(i in 1:11){
  Sys.sleep(3)
  url <- paste(base_url, i, sep = '')
  url <- read_html(url)
  nds <- html_nodes(url, xpath='//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "media-heading", " " ))]//a')
  embedded_url <- html_attr(nds, "href")
  headlines <- html_text(nds)
  df <- data.frame(headline = headlines, link = embedded_url)
  time_magazine_data <- rbind(time_magazine_data, df)
}
```

```{r}
time_magazine_art <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:nrow(time_magazine_data)) {
  Sys.sleep(3)
  link <- time_magazine_data$link[i]
  if (paths_allowed(link)) {
    tryCatch({
      url <- read_html(link)
      date_node <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//time')
      date <- ifelse(length(date_node) > 0, paste(html_text(date_node), collapse = "; "), NA)
      article_node <- html_nodes(url, '#article-body')
      article <- ifelse(length(article_node) > 0, paste(html_text(article_node), collapse = " "), NA)
      df <- data.frame(date = date, link = link, article = article, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
      time_magazine_art<- rbind(time_magazine_art, df)
    }, error = function(e) {
      message("Error processing link: ", link, "\n", e)
    })
  }
}
```

```{r}
beep(sound = 2)
```

```{r}
time_mag <- time_magazine_art %>% 
  full_join(time_magazine_data, 
            by = 'link')

anti_join(time_magazine_art, time_magazine_data, by = "link")
```

```{r}
write.csv(time_mag, '/Users/sagnikchakravarty/Desktop/YoungThug/Time_Magazine.csv')
```

### People's Magazine

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)

n <- 0
peoples_mag_data <- list()

while (n < 100) {
  Sys.sleep(2)
  base_url <- paste0('https://people.com/search?young%20thug=young+thug&offset=', n, '&q=young+thug')
  url <- read_html(base_url)
  article_nodes <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//a[contains(@class, "mntl-card-list-card--extendable")]')
  headlines <- html_nodes(article_nodes, xpath = './/*[contains(@class, "card__title-text")]') %>% 
               html_text()
  links <- html_attr(article_nodes, "href")
  df <- data.frame(headlines, links, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  peoples_mag_data[[length(peoples_mag_data) + 1]] <- df
  n <- n + 24
}
peoples_mag_data <- do.call(rbind, peoples_mag_data)
print(peoples_mag_data)
```

```{r}
peoples_mag_art <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:nrow(peoples_mag_data)){
  Sys.sleep(1)
  url <- read_html(peoples_mag_data$links[i])
  date_nds <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "mntl-attribution__item-date", " " ))]')
  article_nds <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "article-content", " " ))]')
  df <- data.frame(links = peoples_mag_data$links[i],
                                article = html_text(article_nds),
                                pub_date = html_text(date_nds))
  peoples_mag_art <- rbind(peoples_mag_art, df)
}

print(peoples_mag_art)
```

```{r}
people_magazine <- peoples_mag_data %>% full_join(peoples_mag_art,
                                                  join_by('links' == 'links'))
print(people_magazine)
```

```{r}
write.csv(people_magazine, '/Users/sagnikchakravarty/Desktop/YoungThug/people_magazine.csv')
```

### TMZ

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)

tmz_data <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:12) {
  # Construct the URL
  base_url <- paste0('https://www.tmz.com/people/young-thug/?page=', i)
  
  # Read the HTML content of the page
  url <- read_html(base_url)
  
  # Select the <a> tags containing the links
  article_nodes <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//article[contains(@class, "gridler__card")]//a[contains(@class, "gridler__card-link")]')
  
  # Extract the headlines
  headlines <- html_nodes(article_nodes, xpath = './/h3[contains(@class, "gridler__card-title")]') %>% 
               html_text(trim = TRUE)
  
  # Extract the links
  links <- html_attr(article_nodes, "href")
  
  # Extract the publication dates
  dates <- html_nodes(article_nodes, xpath = './/span[contains(@class, "gridler__media-date")]') %>% 
           html_text(trim = TRUE)
  
  # Ensure lengths match by finding the shorter length
  min_length <- min(length(headlines), length(links), length(dates))
  headlines <- headlines[1:min_length]
  links <- links[1:min_length]
  dates <- dates[1:min_length]
  
  # Combine into a data frame
  df <- data.frame(headline = headlines, links = links, date = dates, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  
  # Append to the main data frame
  tmz_data <- rbind(tmz_data, df)
}

# Print the resulting data frame
print(tmz_data)



```

```{r}
tmz_art <- data.frame()
for(i in 1:nrow(tmz_data)){
  Sys.sleep(1)
  url <- read_html(tmz_data$links[i])
  art_node <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "clearfix", " " ))]')
  df <- data.frame(links = tmz_data$links[i],
                   article = html_text(art_node))
  tmz_art <- rbind(tmz_art, df)
}
```

```{r}
tmz <- tmz_data %>% full_join(tmz_art,
                              join_by('links' == 'links'))
```

```{r}
write.csv(people_magazine, '/Users/sagnikchakravarty/Desktop/YoungThug/tmz.csv')
```

### XXL

```{r}
library(rvest)
library(dplyr)

# Initialize an empty data frame
xxl_data <- data.frame()

# Number of pages to scrape
num_pages <- 130

# Create a progress bar
progress_bar <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, max = num_pages, style = 3)

for (i in 1:num_pages) {
  Sys.sleep(1)  # Avoid hitting the server too frequently

  # Update progress bar
  setTxtProgressBar(progress_bar, i)

  # Construct the URL
  base_url <- paste0('https://www.xxlmag.com/search/?s=young%20thug&searchpage=', i)

  # Read the HTML content of the page
  url <- read_html(base_url)

  # Extract the headline nodes
  headline_nodes <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//article[@class="teaser"]//a[@class="title"]')
  headlines <- html_text(headline_nodes, trim = TRUE)

  # Extract the links
  links <- html_attr(headline_nodes, 'href')

  # Extract publication dates using a refined XPath
  date_nodes <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//article[@class="teaser"]//div[@class="auth-date"]/time')
  publication_dates <- html_text(date_nodes, trim = TRUE)

  # Extract snippets
  snippet_nodes <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//article[@class="teaser"]//p[@class="excerpt"]')
  snippets <- html_text(snippet_nodes, trim = TRUE)

  # Ensure all vectors are of equal length
  min_length <- min(length(headlines), length(links), length(publication_dates), length(snippets))
  headlines <- headlines[1:min_length]
  links <- links[1:min_length]
  publication_dates <- publication_dates[1:min_length]
  snippets <- snippets[1:min_length]

  # Combine into a data frame
  df <- data.frame(
    headlines = headlines,
    publication_date = publication_dates,
    snippet = snippets,
    links = links,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  # Append to the main data frame
  xxl_data <- rbind(xxl_data, df)
}

# Close the progress bar
close(progress_bar)

# View the resulting data frame
print(xxl_data)

# Print the resulting data frame
print(xxl_data)
```

```{r}
dat <- xxl_data
```

```{r}
xxl_art <- data.frame()
progress_bar <- txtProgressBar(min = 0, 
                               max = nrow(xxl_data), style = 3)
for(i in 1:nrow(xxl_data)){
  Sys.sleep(1)
  setTxtProgressBar(progress_bar, i)
  url <- read_html(xxl_data$links[i])
  article_nodes <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "content-wrap", " " ))]//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "content", " " ))]')
  date_node <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//time')
  df <- data.frame(link = xxl_data$links[i],
                   article = html_text(article_nodes),
                   pub_date = html_text(date_node))
  xxl_art <- rbind(xxl_art, df)
}
close(progress_bar)
```

```{r}
beep(sound =3)
```

```{r}
xxl_data <- xxl_data %>% select(-publication_date)
```

```{r}
xxl <- xxl_data %>% full_join(xxl_art,
                              join_by('links' == 'link'))
```

```{r}
write.csv(xxl, '/Users/sagnikchakravarty/Desktop/YoungThug/xxl.csv')
```

### GPB

```{r}
url <- read_html(gpb_data$links[1])
nds <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "body-content--npr-news", " " ))]')
print(html_text(nds))
```

```{r}
library(rvest)

gpb_data <- list()  # Use a list to store data initially for better efficiency

for(i in 1:8) {
  base_url <- paste('https://www.gpb.org/search?search=young%20thug&page=', i, sep = '')
  url <- read_html(base_url)
  
  # Extract headlines
  head_nodes <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "card-teaser__title-link", " " ))]')
  
  # Extract publication date
  date_nodes <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//time')
  
  # Extract snippets
  snippet_nodes <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[(@id = "main-content")]//p')
  
  # Extract text
  headline <- html_text(head_nodes)
  link <- html_attr(head_nodes, 'href')
  publication_date <- html_text(date_nodes)
  snippet <- html_text(snippet_nodes)
  
  # Prepend base URL to links if necessary
  link <- ifelse(grepl('^/', link), paste0('https://www.gpb.org', link), link)
  
  # Determine the maximum length among all vectors
  max_length <- max(length(headline), length(publication_date), length(snippet), length(link))
  
  # Pad shorter vectors with NAs
  headline <- c(headline, rep(NA, max_length - length(headline)))
  publication_date <- c(publication_date, rep(NA, max_length - length(publication_date)))
  snippet <- c(snippet, rep(NA, max_length - length(snippet)))
  link <- c(link, rep(NA, max_length - length(link)))
  
  # Create a data frame with the padded columns
  df <- data.frame(
    headlines = headline,
    publication_date = publication_date,
    snippets = snippet,
    links = link,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Append to the list
  gpb_data[[i]] <- df
}

# Combine all data frames from the list into one
gpb_data <- do.call(rbind, gpb_data)

# Print the resulting dataframe
print(gpb_data)


```

```{r}
library(httr)

gpb_art <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:nrow(gpb_data)) {
  Sys.sleep(0.5)  # To avoid rate-limiting issues
  
  # Check if the URL is accessible
  response <- tryCatch({
    GET(gpb_data$links[i])
  }, error = function(e) {
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  # If the URL is valid (status 200), proceed
  if (!is.null(response) && status_code(response) == 200) {
    url <- read_html(gpb_data$links[i])
    
    # Check if the XPath query returns any nodes
    nds <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "body-content--npr-news", " " ))]')
    
    # If nodes are found, extract text; otherwise, return NA for the article
    if(length(nds) > 0) {
      article_text <- html_text(nds)
    } else {
      article_text <- NA  # If no article is found, set article_text to NA
    }
    
    # Create a data frame and append it to the main data frame
    df <- data.frame(
      links = gpb_data$links[i],
      article = article_text,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    gpb_art <- rbind(gpb_art, df)
    
  } else {
    message("Skipping invalid or inaccessible URL: ", gpb_data$links[i])
  }
}

# Print the resulting dataframe
print(gpb_art)


```

```{r}
gpb <- gpb_data %>% full_join(gpb_art,
                              join_by('links' == 'links'))
```

```{r}
write.csv(gpb, '/Users/sagnikchakravarty/Desktop/YoungThug/gpb.csv')
```

### Fox 5 atlanta

```{r}
url <- read_html('https://www.fox5atlanta.com/search?q=ysl%20rico&sort=date&page=1&from=2018-01-19')
nds <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "title", " " ))]//a')
print(html_attr(nds, 'href'))
```

```{r}
library(rvest)

fox5_data <- list()  # Use a list to store data initially for better efficiency

for (i in 1:131) {
  Sys.sleep(1)
  # Construct the base URL with pagination
  base_url <- paste0('https://www.fox5atlanta.com/search?q=ysl%20rico&sort=date&page=', i, '&from=2018-01-19')
  
  # URLencode to handle any special characters in the query
  encoded_url <- URLencode(base_url)
  
  # Read the HTML content of the URL
  url <- tryCatch({
    read_html(encoded_url)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("Error in fetching URL: ", encoded_url)
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  if (is.null(url)) {
    next  # Skip to the next iteration if the URL is invalid
  }
  
  # Extract headlines (update the XPath as per the correct structure)
  head_nodes <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "title", " " ))]//a')
  
  # Extract publication date (update the XPath as per the correct structure)
  date_nodes <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "time", " " ))]')
  
  # Extract snippets (update the XPath as per the correct structure)
  snippet_nodes <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "dek", " " ))]')
  
  # Extract the text content from the nodes
  headline <- html_text(head_nodes)
  link <- html_attr(head_nodes, 'href')
  publication_date <- html_text(date_nodes)
  snippet <- html_text(snippet_nodes)
  
  # Prepend base URL to links if necessary (if relative URL)
  link <- ifelse(grepl('^/', link), paste0('https://www.fox5atlanta.com', link), link)
  
  # Determine the maximum length among all vectors
  max_length <- max(length(headline), length(publication_date), length(snippet), length(link))
  
  # Pad shorter vectors with NAs
  headline <- c(headline, rep(NA, max_length - length(headline)))
  publication_date <- c(publication_date, rep(NA, max_length - length(publication_date)))
  snippet <- c(snippet, rep(NA, max_length - length(snippet)))
  link <- c(link, rep(NA, max_length - length(link)))
  
  # Create a data frame with the padded columns
  df <- data.frame(
    headlines = headline,
    publication_date = publication_date,
    snippets = snippet,
    links = link,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  # Append to the list
  fox5_data[[i]] <- df
}

# Combine all data frames from the list into one
fox5_data <- do.call(rbind, fox5_data)

# Print the resulting dataframe
print(fox5_data)

```

```{r}
library(httr)

fox5_art <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:nrow(fox5_data)) {
  Sys.sleep(0.5)  # To avoid rate-limiting issues
  
  # Check if the URL is accessible
  response <- tryCatch({
    GET(fox5_data$links[i])
  }, error = function(e) {
    return(NULL)
  })
  
  # If the URL is valid (status 200), proceed
  if (!is.null(response) && status_code(response) == 200) {
    url <- read_html(fox5_data$links[i])
    
    # Check if the XPath query returns any nodes
    nds <- html_nodes(url, xpath = '//*[contains(concat( " ", @class, " " ), concat( " ", "article-body", " " ))]')
    
    # If nodes are found, extract text; otherwise, return NA for the article
    if(length(nds) > 0) {
      article_text <- html_text(nds)
    } else {
      article_text <- NA  # If no article is found, set article_text to NA
    }
    
    # Create a data frame and append it to the main data frame
    df <- data.frame(
      links = fox5_data$links[i],
      article = article_text,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    fox5_art <- rbind(fox5_art, df)
    
  } else {
    message("Skipping invalid or inaccessible URL: ", fox5_data$links[i])
  }
}

# Print the resulting dataframe
print(fox5_art)
```

```{r}
atlanta_fox5 <- fox5_data %>% full_join(fox5_art,
                                        join_by('links' == 'links'))
```

```{r}
write.csv(atlanta_fox5, '/Users/sagnikchakravarty/Desktop/YoungThug/atlanta_fox5csv')
```
